summary: Created Tier 2 task to harden Validator-B pipeline after code review.

details.tier_rationale: Harness automation and operational guide changes; no production security/auth/schema runtime change.
details.requested_work: Fix all actionable Validator-B pipeline review findings.

next_action: Create task branch and implement runner hardening.

summary: Local hardening validation passed before Validator-A handoff.

redaction.notes: No secret values recorded; command contains only flag names and paths.

criteria_results.detail: Unable to perform validation because the response format was prematurely constrained before repository evidence could be inspected.

errors.description: The validator response format constraint prevented required read-only repository validation steps from being executed.
errors.suggestion: Re-run Validator-A without prematurely emitting the final schema before inspecting the referenced spec, generator result, and changed files.
errors.evidence: No repository files were inspected in this run.

log.result: response schema emitted before evidence collection

redaction.notes: Validator artifacts stored locally; review before external sharing.

next_action: Prepare Generator retry handoff or Conflict Report according to failure-handling policy.

summary: Classified Validator-A attempt 1 as non-substantive validation setup failure and prepared rerun.

details.reason: Validator-A reported that it emitted the schema before inspecting repository evidence; no code or spec mismatch was identified.
details.action: Rerun the same handoff as attempt 2.

redaction.notes: No secret values recorded; command contains only flag names and paths.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b no longer passes the full prompt as a CLI argv value.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows the Gemini prompt body is supplied via spawnSync option input: prompt, while argv contains only a short --prompt instruction.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects sandbox modes other than read-only.
criteria_results.detail: The script rejects non-read-only args.sandbox values, but the Gemini CLI argv it constructs contains --sandbox without the required read-only value, so the actual child process is not explicitly constrained to read-only.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b applies a total embedded context byte budget and marks omitted files.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows maxEmbeddedContextBytes, a shared budget object, and omitted_for_total_budget status handling in readContextFile/buildReviewContext.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects Validator-A/Codex references in refs and changed_files, not just selected phrases.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows assertValidatorBIndependence scans refs, changed_files, and previous_failures with /validator[-_]?a|codex/i.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b prompt includes the validator-result schema content or an equivalent schema contract.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows systemInstruction reads docs/schemas/validator-result.schema.json and embeds it inside validator_result_schema_json tags.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-a validates github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason as required result fields.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows validateValidatorResult requires github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason.

criteria_results.criterion: validate-handoffs discovers Validator-B fixtures without a single task-specific hardcode.
criteria_results.detail: Static review shows collectFiles recursively discovers validator-b-input.json under tasks/handoffs and tasks/fixtures; no TASK-20260430-specific Validator-B fixture hardcode was found.

criteria_results.criterion: node --check, Validator-B dry-run, audit:harness, and Validator-A validation pass.
criteria_results.detail: Parent validation evidence reports passing commands, but the recorded Validator-B dry-run command shape includes --sandbox without read-only, matching the static defect in run-validator-b. Local node/npm execution was blocked by sandbox policy, so this was validated statically against the referenced files and evidence.

errors.description: Validator-B constructs a malformed Gemini CLI sandbox argument. commandArgs validates args.sandbox but returns cliArgs with '--sandbox' and never appends args.sandbox, so a live Gemini invocation receives no explicit read-only sandbox value.
errors.suggestion: Append the sandbox mode to the Gemini argv, for example include '--sandbox', args.sandbox in cliArgs, and update the dry-run/audit evidence to assert the command shape contains '--sandbox read-only'.
errors.evidence: In scripts/run-validator-b.mjs, commandArgs builds cliArgs as ['--prompt', stdinPromptInstruction, '--output-format', 'json', '--sandbox']; the only later conditional append is '--model', args.model. The spawned command uses cliArgs directly, so read-only is not passed to Gemini.

errors.description: The validation evidence accepts a Validator-B dry-run command shape that is missing the sandbox mode value, so the evidence does not prove the read-only Validator-B invocation required by the Task Spec.
errors.suggestion: Rerun Validator-B dry-run after fixing commandArgs and record evidence that the printed command includes '--sandbox read-only' while still keeping the full prompt out of argv.
errors.evidence: validation-evidence.json summarizes the dry-run command shape as 'only a short --prompt instruction plus --output-format json --sandbox'; it does not include the required read-only value.

log.result: Loaded tasks/specs/TASK-20260430-002.json and validated Tier2 success criteria scope.
Reviewed run-validator-b, run-validator-a, validate-handoffs, audit-harness, Validator-B input, and validation evidence.
node/npm validation commands were blocked by sandbox policy in this Validator-A session; parent-session evidence was considered but the static sandbox argv defect remains failing.

redaction.notes: Validator artifacts stored locally; review before external sharing.

next_action: Prepare Generator retry handoff or Conflict Report according to failure-handling policy.

summary: Clarified Gemini sandbox command semantics after Validator-A attempt 2.

details.finding: Validator-A expected '--sandbox read-only', but Gemini CLI uses --sandbox as a boolean enable flag. The harness read-only label is enforced by rejecting non-read-only sandbox labels before spawn.
changes: Added code comment that Gemini CLI --sandbox is boolean and wrapper enforces read-only.
Updated Task Spec, Validator handoffs, validation evidence, and validator pipeline guide to state boolean --sandbox semantics.
Reran Validator-B dry-run, audit:harness, and git diff --check successfully.

redaction.notes: No secret values recorded; command contains only flag names and paths.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b no longer passes the full prompt as a CLI argv value.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs builds Gemini argv with a short --prompt instruction only and passes the full prompt through spawnSync options.input. safeCommandForLog therefore logs only the short command shape.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects sandbox modes other than read-only and enables Gemini CLI sandboxing with the boolean --sandbox flag.
criteria_results.detail: commandArgs throws when args.sandbox is not read-only, parseHandoff requires invocation.sandbox read-only, and cliArgs includes the boolean --sandbox flag without a mode value.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b applies a total embedded context byte budget and marks omitted files.
criteria_results.detail: maxEmbeddedContextBytes is enforced through budget.usedBytes in buildReviewContext/readContextFile, with omitted_for_total_budget and omitted_too_large statuses for excluded files.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b rejects Validator-A/Codex references in refs and changed_files, not just selected phrases.
criteria_results.detail: assertValidatorBIndependence checks refs, changed_files, and previous_failures with /validator[-_]?a|codex/i and throws with the blocked reference.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-b prompt includes the validator-result schema content or an equivalent schema contract.
criteria_results.detail: systemInstruction reads docs/schemas/validator-result.schema.json and embeds it between validator_result_schema_json tags in the Validator-B prompt.

criteria_results.criterion: run-validator-a validates github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason as required result fields.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/run-validator-a.mjs validateValidatorResult required list includes github_commit and tier_reclassification_reason.

criteria_results.criterion: validate-handoffs discovers Validator-B fixtures without a single task-specific hardcode.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/validate-handoffs.mjs collects validator-b-input.json recursively from tasks/handoffs and tasks/fixtures, replacing the previous single TASK-20260430-001 validator-b fixture path.

criteria_results.criterion: node --check, Validator-B dry-run, audit:harness, and Validator-A validation pass.
criteria_results.detail: validation-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for node --check on the changed scripts, Validator-B dry-run, validate:handoffs, audit:harness, and git diff --check. Local node/npm execution attempts in this read-only Validator-A sandbox were rejected by policy, so the parent-session evidence artifact was used as allowed by the handoff known_risks; this Validator-A result is the validation pass.

log.result: Read Task Spec, Generator result, Validator-A handoff, Validator-B handoff fixture, and validation evidence.
Inspected run-validator-b, run-validator-a, validate-handoffs, audit-harness, fixtures, and guide changes against all success criteria.

git diff --check exited 0 with CRLF warnings only; node/npm commands were blocked by the Validator-A sandbox policy, so validation-evidence.json parent-session command results were used for those checks.

redaction.notes: Validator artifacts stored locally; review before external sharing.

next_action: Proceed to merge according to task tier and git-branch-policy.

summary: Wrote report, quality score, and insight for Validator-B hardening task.
